title: IEC 62443 Multi-Tenant Architecture Specification
description: Abstract multi-tenant architecture description for NC-1/NC-2/NC-3 blind-spot classification. Labels must be abstract roles (APT, ALN-A, etc.) — real operator identification is prohibited.

schema_version.description: Architecture schema version. Only '1' is accepted in this release.

source.description: Derivation provenance. REQUIRED when sample is derived from standards.

standards.description: Public standards/specifications the architecture derives from.

paper.description: Optional citation of a paper describing the architecture.

role.description: IEC 62443 role. AO = asset owner (independent); SP = service provider. Only AO and SP are evaluated by NC-1/NC-2/NC-3.

sp_relations.description: List of service-provider-to-asset-owner relationships per IEC 62443-2-4 (Clauses 3.1.12, 3.1.13 and SP.08.02 BR). An SP with such a relationship to an AO is covered by that AO's service contract (NC-2 is NOT satisfied).

scope.description: Optional list of conduit ids that this SP-AO relationship covers. If omitted, the relationship is treated as covering every conduit whose endpoints match this SP-AO pair.

zone_authorities.description: Per IEC 62443-3-2 ZCR-1 (Clauses 4.3.1-4.3.3): zone/conduit partitioning requires a single designating organisation per zone. NC-3 is satisfied when a conduit's two endpoints live in zones controlled by *distinct* organisations (no single org can unilaterally assign monitoring authority).

org.description: id of the designating organisation (must match an asset_owner id)

owner.description: id of the asset_owner that owns this endpoint asset
